rationale: House-wide ADVISORY convention already exists (vision_gate, verify_verdict); final_score's own comment already states advisory intent; no downstream consumer relies on the misleading 'refined to rubric convergence' claim. Option A has zero precedent for a root-level post-reassembly loop-back and would overturn a documented design decision.
rule: Option B: rn-refine final_score verdict is advisory (description wording fix)
alternatives_rejected: Option A: add a bounded refine_iteration-style loop-back on the reassembled root, gated by a max-root-iterations counter
